en: Yeah, it used to be right in the middle of Single Jeopardy, now they do it right after Single Jeopardy. Yeah, it's much better, isn't it? Oh, no comparison.

en: Hey, I gotta stop at the bookstore and get my parents one of those French-English dictionaries.

en: Your parents are going to Paris, right? Yeah.

en: I have to do is buy some postcards and have your parents mail them from Paris. What about little Joey? Who?
